### Fix 3
Lines: 38, 43
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.

Let me start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1: `Button.variant` type changed
The type added `'stateful'` to the union. The current code uses `ButtonVariant.primary` (line 38) and `"link"` (line 43). Both values are still valid in the new type. **No code change needed** — these are valid values.

### Fix 2: Modal family migration
This is the major change. The Modal component needs to be restructured:
- `title={title}` (line 53) → moves to `<ModalHeader title={title} />`
- `titleIconVariant="warning"` (line 54) → moves to `<ModalHeader titleIconVariant="warning" />`
- `footer={...}` (line 35-48) → the JSX content becomes children of `<ModalFooter>`
- Need to add imports: `ModalBody`, `ModalHeader`, `ModalFooter`
- The `{message}` children content should go inside `<ModalBody>`

### Fix 3: Icon children to prop for Button
Looking at lines 38-39 and 43-44, neither Button contains icon elements from `@patternfly/react-icons`. They contain text (`{btnText || t('Confirm')}` and `{t('Cancel')}`). **No code change needed** — these Buttons don't have icon children.

Now let me check if there are companion test files:
No test files. Now let me apply the changes. The only substantive fix is Fix 2 (Modal family migration). Let me write the updated file:

arguments.after:
import {
  ActionList,
  ActionListItem,
  Button,
  ButtonVariant,
  Modal,
  ModalBody,
  ModalFooter,
  ModalHeader,
  ModalVariant,
} from '@patternfly/react-core';

<Modal
      className="ocs-modal networking-modal"
      id="confirm-modal"
      isOpen
      onClose={closeModal}
      position={'top'}
      variant={ModalVariant.small}
    >
      <ModalHeader title={title} titleIconVariant="warning" />
      <ModalBody>{message}</ModalBody>
      <ModalFooter>
        <ActionList className="tabmodal-footer">
          <ActionListItem>
            <Button onClick={executeFn} variant={ButtonVariant.primary}>
              {btnText || t('Confirm')}
            </Button>
          </ActionListItem>
          <ActionListItem>
            <Button onClick={closeModal} variant="link">
              {t('Cancel')}
            </Button>
          </ActionListItem>
        </ActionList>
      </ModalFooter>
    </Modal>
arguments.before:
<Modal
      className="ocs-modal networking-modal"
      footer={
        <ActionList className="tabmodal-footer">
          <ActionListItem>
            <Button onClick={executeFn} variant={ButtonVariant.primary}>
              {btnText || t('Confirm')}
            </Button>
          </ActionListItem>
          <ActionListItem>
            <Button onClick={closeModal} variant="link">
              {t('Cancel')}
            </Button>
          </ActionListItem>
        </ActionList>
      }
      id="confirm-modal"
      isOpen
      onClose={closeModal}
      position={'top'}
      title={title}
      titleIconVariant="warning"
      variant={ModalVariant.small}
    >
      {message}
    </Modal>

content.text: Let me verify the final file:

The file looks correct. All changes are properly applied.

## Changes Applied

1. **Fix 1** (`Button.variant` type changed): **No change needed.** The values used (`ButtonVariant.primary` on line 49 and `"link"` on line 54) are both still valid in the new type union. The only change to the type was the addition of `'stateful'`, which doesn't affect existing usage.

2. **Fix 2** (Modal family migration): **Applied.** Three changes made:
   - **Added imports** for `ModalBody`, `ModalHeader`, `ModalFooter` from `@patternfly/react-core` (lines 9-11).
   - **Moved `title` and `titleIconVariant` props** from `<Modal>` to a new `<ModalHeader title={title} titleIconVariant="warning" />` child component (line 44).
   - **Moved `footer` prop content** from `<Modal footer={...}>` to a `<ModalFooter>` child component wrapping the same `<ActionList>` JSX (lines 46-59).
   - **Wrapped `{message}` children** in `<ModalBody>` (line 45).
   - Removed the `footer`, `title`, and `titleIconVariant` props from `<Modal>`.

3. **Fix 3** (`Button` icon children to prop): **No change needed.** Neither `<Button>` instance contains icon elements from `@patternfly/react-icons`. Line 49 contains `{btnText || t('Confirm')}` (text content) and line 54 contains `{t('Cancel')}` (text content). The rule only applies when a Button contains icon components as children.

The file looks correct. All changes are properly applied.

## Changes Applied

1. **Fix 1** (`Button.variant` type changed): **No change needed.** The values used (`ButtonVariant.primary` on line 49 and `"link"` on line 54) are both still valid in the new type union. The only change to the type was the addition of `'stateful'`, which doesn't affect existing usage.

2. **Fix 2** (Modal family migration): **Applied.** Three changes made:
   - **Added imports** for `ModalBody`, `ModalHeader`, `ModalFooter` from `@patternfly/react-core` (lines 9-11).
   - **Moved `title` and `titleIconVariant` props** from `<Modal>` to a new `<ModalHeader title={title} titleIconVariant="warning" />` child component (line 44).
   - **Moved `footer` prop content** from `<Modal footer={...}>` to a `<ModalFooter>` child component wrapping the same `<ActionList>` JSX (lines 46-59).
   - **Wrapped `{message}` children** in `<ModalBody>` (line 45).
   - Removed the `footer`, `title`, and `titleIconVariant` props from `<Modal>`.

3. **Fix 3** (`Button` icon children to prop): **No change needed.** Neither `<Button>` instance contains icon elements from `@patternfly/react-icons`. Line 49 contains `{btnText || t('Confirm')}` (text content) and line 54 contains `{t('Cancel')}` (text content). The rule only applies when a Button contains icon components as children.
